overall.description: Third-person survival horror gameplay footage showing a character exploring a dark, foggy abandoned house at night using a flashlight. The character moves from the overgrown yard through the ground floor, up to the second floor, and discovers a hospital room with a patient inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown yard of abandoned suburban house

events.description: character approaches the front steps of the house

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark yard toward the house, sweeping flashlight across the facade

entered.detail: two-story wooden house with covered porch and lit windows
tall lamp post casting yellow light in the distance
tall grass and weeds covering the ground
covered entrance with wooden columns and steps
concrete steps leading up to the front door

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an overgrown yard toward an abandoned house at night. The flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing tall grass and the silhouette of a two-story wooden house with a covered porch. A distant street lamp provides minimal ambient light through the fog.

events.description: character enters the house through the front door
interior space becomes darker as character moves deeper into the house

agents.ego_description: ascending the front steps and entering through the front door into the foyer

entered.detail: black and white tiled flooring in the entry hall
narrow hallway with wooden paneling and archways
grand staircase with wooden banister leading to second floor
decorative arch leading to interior rooms

segments.scene_description: The character enters the house through the front door, transitioning from the foggy exterior to the dimly lit interior. The flashlight reveals a checkered floor entry hall and a grand wooden staircase to the right. The space is quiet and abandoned, with wooden paneling lining the walls.

events.description: character ascends the main staircase to the second floor
moving from stairwell to upstairs carpeted hallway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase and exploring the second floor hallways, checking rooms

entered.detail: carpeted corridor with multiple doorways and wall decorations
framed artwork hanging on the hallway walls
tall white water dispenser with blue bottle
ornate wooden railing along the staircase
heavy red curtains covering windows at hallway end

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase to the second floor, entering a carpeted hallway lined with framed paintings. The flashlight beam passes over a water cooler and wooden banister as the character explores the upper level, moving past doorways and heavy curtains.

events.description: character enters a room with medical equipment and a hospital bed
character approaches the patient lying in the hospital bed

agents.ego_description: entering the medical room and approaching the hospital bed to investigate the patient

notable_agents.action: patient lying motionless in hospital bed with IV drip and medical monitors

entered.detail: metal frame hospital bed with white sheets and patient lying on it
IV stand and monitoring devices next to the bed
tall metal stand with intravenous bag and tubing

segments.scene_description: The character enters a room that has been converted into a medical ward, discovering a hospital bed with a patient connected to IV equipment. After approaching and examining the patient, the character turns and exits back into the hallway, passing medical posters on the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, foggy exterior into the claustrophobic depths of an abandoned house. It begins in an overgrown yard where a flashlight cuts through the mist to reveal the silhouette of a two-story wooden home. As the character steps through the front door, the environment shifts from the damp night air to a dimly lit interior featuring a checkered entry hall and a grand wooden staircase. The camera then ascends to the second floor, moving through a carpeted hallway lined with framed paintings and heavy curtains before turning into a room converted into a medical ward. Finally, the scene culminates in the discovery of a patient in a hospital bed connected to IV equipment, before the camera retreats back into the hallway past medical posters.
